creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Most recent poudriere from the ports tree is used to create packages used in our environment. When updating net/icinga2 via "pkg upgrade", the icinga2 daemon wishes to access /var/cache/icinga2 on master and satellites and fails, because the ownership of var/cache/icinga2 is set to root:icinga instead of icinga:icinga.

When installing net/icinga2 the classical way from sources via the ports tree, this problem doesn't occur.
